info.title: Generate Docs API
info.description: Generate documentation from a stored code artifact

post.summary: Generate documentation for a code artifact
post.description: Reads the code file at the given S3 URI, generates documentation using an LLM, and stores it in S3. For IaC artifacts this produces a deployment runbook; for application code it produces developer documentation. Returns the S3 URI of the generated documentation.

s3_uri.description: S3 URI of the generated code artifact (e.g. s3://bucket/generated/uuid/timestamp.tf)

artifact_type.description: Type of code artifact — pass whatever the upstream sub-agent reported (e.g. terraform, cloudformation, cdk, go, rust). If omitted, the type is read from the artifact's S3 metadata.

manifest_s3_path.description: S3 URI of the configuration manifest produced by the diagram pipeline (e.g. s3://bucket/diagrams/name/manifest_final.json). When provided for an IaC artifact, a manifest-aware runbook is generated that includes a Configuration Decisions table and an Assumptions checklist. Omit for text-only requests.

doc_s3_uri.description: S3 URI of the generated Markdown documentation

request_id.description: Request ID linking the code artifact and its documentation
